steps.title: Isolate the fraction
steps.content:
Subtract $18$ from both sides of the equation:
$$
p-18=\frac{12}{n}
$$

steps.title: Solve for n
steps.content: Multiply by $n$, then divide by $p-18$. This division is allowed because the question gives $p>18$. $$ n(p-18)=12 $$ $$ n=\frac{12}{p-18} $$ The answer is D.
